meaning: n.正统派基督教,此派的运动
examples: Is this countrified bleak fundamentalism a spoof?
Fundamentalism has spread from rural areas to the affluent suburbs.
Perhaps some of them are getting ready to convert from fundamentalism to common sense.
He was a religious moderate in a nation that had become infected with religious fundamentalism.
Many young Turks are more religious than their parents, fuelling fears of a spread of fundamentalism.
